title: 8 Herbal Tinctures For Leg Pain
description: Ginkgo biloba tinctures contains flavonoids and terpenoids as its bioactive constituents. These compounds have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce swelling and pain in the legs. The flavonoids, specifically quercetin and kaempferol, inhibit the production of pro-inflammatory enzymes, which contribute to leg pain. Terpenoids, particularly ginkgolides, have potent anti-inflammatory effects that further alleviate pain and discomfort in the legs. The combination of flavonoids and...
